cleavage agent: Search criteria included oxidation of methionine (+15.9949) as a variable modification and carbamidomethylation of cysteine (+57.0214) and (where used in the original experiment) the addition of the TMT mass tag (+229.163) to peptide N-termini and lysine as fixed modifications. Searches were performed with full tryptic digestion
instrument: subsequent proteomic analysis by nano-LC MS/MS using an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: the addition of the TMT mass tag (+229.163) to peptide N-termini and lysine as fixed modifications
